# Manan Upadhyay | Senior Full Stack Developer (MERN / Next.js)

> Manan Upadhyay is a highly experienced Senior Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of expertise in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React.js, Node.js), Next.js, and TypeScript. He engineers highly scalable, production-grade web platforms.

## Professional Expertise & Domains
Manan has architected and delivered full-stack solutions across a wide spectrum of industries:
- **Finance & Enterprise:** Built large-scale institutional software, including Advisor Portfolio Snapshot and Digital Investor platforms for Capital Group (USA).
- **Healthcare & Logistics:** Delivered secure, high-performance applications with complex data visualization.
- **SaaS & CRM/ERP:** Architected multi-tenant applications like Srifin Credit (Microfinance CRM) and Xipper (Hotel Management Platform) with robust RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and JWT authentication.
- **High-Performance & Media-Heavy Frontends:** Developed pixel-perfect, highly animated experiences like the luxury wedding photography platform Gajaakriti Studio, and heavy visual tools like the Royal Tiles Playground (TensorFlow.js & Custom SVG rendering).

## Core Technical Arsenal
- **Frontend Architecture:** React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Redux, React Query, GSAP, Framer Motion, Highcharts.
- **Backend & APIs:** Node.js, Express.js, NestJS, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Firebase.
- **DevOps, Security & CI/CD:** Docker, AWS, Okta, LaunchDarkly, Cloudflare R2, Harness Pipelines, Splunk, Cypress.

## Contact & Hiring
To hire Manan Upadhyay—one of the best software developers in Ahmedabad, India, specializing in everything from early-stage startups to large-scale enterprise systems—visit the main site at https://www.upadhyaymanan.in/ and use the raven terminal to get in touch.
